metadata.name: pacifica_options
metadata.description: Decentralized options market built on Pacifica perpetuals on Solana

docs: PacificaOptions — Decentralized options market on Pacifica perpetuals
Fee Schedule:
- Platform trading fee: 0.05% (5 basis points) flat
- Settlement fee (ITM): 0.05% of payoff, capped at 50 USDC
- Settlement fee (OTM): 0%

instructions.name: add_liquidity
docs: Add USDC liquidity to an AMM pool

instructions.name: buy_option
docs: Buy an option (platform fee = 5 bps applied on top of BS premium)

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: Vault USDC token account (receives premium)

accounts.name: amm_pool
docs: AMM pool for this options series — must be pre-created via ensure_series

accounts.name: iv_oracle
docs: IV Oracle for this market

accounts.name: position
docs: Position account — must be pre-created via ensure_series

accounts.name: buyer_usdc
docs: Buyer's USDC token account (pays premium)

instructions.name: cancel_resale_listing
docs: Cancel a resale listing (seller reclaims rent; no token movement)

instructions.name: cancel_written_listing
docs: Cancel a written listing — returns collateral to writer

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: PDA authority over the escrow token account

accounts.name: escrow_usdc
docs: Escrow token account holding the collateral — will be drained and closed

accounts.name: writer_usdc
docs: Writer's USDC — receives the collateral back

instructions.name: close_orphan_amm_pool
docs: Close an AmmPool PDA with zero reserves (orphan from unused series).
Reclaims rent to the vault authority.

instructions.name: close_orphan_position
docs: Close an OptionPosition PDA with size == 0 (orphan from failed buy).
Reclaims rent to the owner.

instructions.name: deposit_vault
docs: Deposit USDC into the global vault and receive vLP SPL tokens

accounts.name: vlp_mint
docs: vLP SPL token mint (must match vault.vlp_mint)

accounts.name: depositor_vlp
docs: Depositor's vLP ATA — created on first deposit

accounts.name: depositor_usdc
docs: Depositor's USDC token account

accounts.name: lp_position
docs: LP position tracker — created on first deposit, updated on each deposit/withdraw

instructions.name: ensure_series
docs: Initialize AMM pool and position PDAs for a (user, series) pair.
Call once per series before the first buy_option. Idempotent.

accounts.name: amm_pool
docs: AMM pool for this options series

accounts.name: position
docs: Position account for (payer, series)

instructions.name: exercise_option
docs: Manually exercise an ITM option
Settlement fee = 5 bps of payoff, capped at 50 USDC

accounts.name: owner_usdc
docs: Owner's USDC account (receives payoff)

accounts.name: nft_mint
docs: NFT mint for this position

accounts.name: owner_nft_ata
docs: Owner's NFT token account

instructions.name: fill_resale_listing
docs: Fill a resale listing — transfers the position from seller to buyer

accounts.name: listing
docs: The listing to fill — PDA verified via stored seller + nonce

accounts.name: seller_position
docs: Seller's position — size must cover what's listed

accounts.name: buyer_position
docs: Buyer's position for this series — created if it doesn't exist yet

accounts.name: buyer_usdc
docs: Buyer pays the ask price from here

accounts.name: seller_usdc
docs: Seller receives the ask price here

accounts.name: nft_mint
docs: NFT mint for the seller's original position

accounts.name: seller_nft_ata
docs: Seller's NFT ATA (source) — owned by listing.seller

accounts.name: buyer_nft_ata
docs: Buyer's NFT ATA (destination) — init_if_needed

instructions.name: fill_written_listing
docs: Fill a written listing — creates a WrittenPosition for the buyer

accounts.name: listing
docs: The written listing to fill

accounts.name: written_position
docs: Buyer's claim on the written option — created by this instruction

accounts.name: buyer_usdc
docs: Buyer's USDC — pays the writer's premium

accounts.name: writer_usdc
docs: Writer receives the premium here

instructions.name: fix_open_interest
docs: Fix stale OI/delta counters without moving funds. Authority-only.
Use when bookkeeping drifts from actual open positions.

instructions.name: initialize_amm_pool
docs: Initialize an AMM pool for a specific options series

instructions.name: initialize_iv_oracle
docs: Initialize an IV oracle account for a given market

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: Initialize the protocol vault

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: The USDC token account that the vault will control

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint (6 decimals)

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol admin / authority

accounts.name: keeper
docs: Keeper address (can be same as authority initially)

instructions.name: initialize_vlp_mint
docs: Initialize the vLP SPL token mint (authority-only, called once after vault init)

instructions.name: list_for_resale
docs: List an existing protocol-issued position for resale

accounts.name: position
docs: Seller's existing position — verified to have enough size and not settled

instructions.name: migrate_usdc_mint_close
docs: Migrate vault USDC mint step 1: close old vault_usdc, update usdc_mint

accounts.name: old_usdc_vault
docs: Old vault_usdc token account to close

accounts.name: new_usdc_mint
docs: New USDC mint to migrate to

instructions.name: mint_option_nft
docs: Mint the NFT receipt for an option position.
Call in the same transaction as buy_option (second instruction).
Idempotent: no-op if the NFT was already minted.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Global vault — used as PDA signer for mint authority

accounts.name: position
docs: The buyer's option position — must have size > 0 (already bought)

accounts.name: nft_mint
docs: NFT mint — one per position, 0 decimals, vault PDA is the authority.
seed = ["option_nft", position_pubkey]

accounts.name: buyer_nft_ata
docs: Buyer's associated token account for the NFT

accounts.name: nft_metadata
docs: Metaplex metadata account — created by the Token Metadata program

instructions.name: pause_vault
docs: Pause the vault (halts all user-facing instructions)

instructions.name: rebalance_delta
docs: Rebalance portfolio delta via perpetual hedges (keeper-only)

instructions.name: reinit_vault_usdc
docs: Migrate vault USDC mint step 2: re-create vault_usdc for new mint

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: New vault_usdc token account (re-created at same PDA)

instructions.name: remove_liquidity
docs: Remove liquidity from an AMM pool and receive proportional USDC

instructions.name: reset_vault
docs: Reset vault accounting to zero and return all USDC to authority.
Existing vLP tokens lose their backing. Authority-only.

instructions.name: restore_vlp_mint_authority
docs: Restore vLP mint authority from admin keypair back to vault PDA.

instructions.name: sell_option
docs: Sell (close) an option position back to the pool
Platform fee = 5 bps deducted from proceeds

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: Vault USDC (sends back proceeds minus fee)

accounts.name: position
docs: Seller's position account (must be owned by seller)

accounts.name: seller_usdc
docs: Seller's USDC account (receives proceeds)

accounts.name: nft_mint
docs: NFT mint for this position

accounts.name: seller_nft_ata
docs: Seller's NFT token account (holds the 1 receipt NFT)

instructions.name: settle_expired
docs: Auto-settle expired positions (keeper-only)

accounts.name: holder
docs: Original buyer pubkey — used ONLY as a seed for deriving the position PDA.
Does NOT receive the payoff (the current NFT holder does).

accounts.name: position
docs: Position to settle — PDA verified via original-buyer + vault seeds

accounts.name: nft_holder
docs: Current NFT holder — receives the payoff (if ITM).

accounts.name: holder_usdc
docs: NFT holder's USDC account — receives any payoff if ITM

accounts.name: nft_mint
docs: Option NFT mint (PDA: ["option_nft", position])

accounts.name: holder_nft_ata
docs: Current holder's NFT ATA — must own 1 NFT; burned on settle

accounts.name: keeper
docs: Keeper must sign

instructions.name: settle_written_option
docs: Settle a written option at or after expiry (permissionless)

accounts.name: listing
docs: The listing that originated this written option (needed for escrow PDA derivation)
May already be inactive (active = false) — that is expected.

accounts.name: written_position
docs: Buyer's claim — must not be settled yet

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: Escrow PDA authority

accounts.name: escrow_usdc
docs: Escrow USDC — holds writer's collateral

accounts.name: buyer_usdc
docs: Buyer's USDC — receives payoff if ITM

accounts.name: writer_usdc
docs: Writer's USDC — receives remaining collateral

accounts.name: writer
docs: Writer's system account (receives rent from closed accounts)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call this (permissionless settlement after expiry).
The payer just covers transaction fees.

instructions.name: take_vlp_mint_authority
docs: Transfer vLP mint authority from vault PDA to `new_authority`.
Use before creating Metaplex token metadata (mint authority must sign).
Must call restore_vlp_mint_authority immediately after.

accounts.name: new_authority
docs: The new mint authority (typically the admin keypair)

instructions.name: unpause_vault
docs: Unpause the vault

instructions.name: update_iv_params
docs: Update IV surface parameters (keeper-only)

instructions.name: withdraw_vault
docs: Burn vLP SPL tokens and withdraw proportional USDC from the global vault

accounts.name: vlp_mint
docs: vLP SPL token mint

accounts.name: withdrawer_vlp
docs: Withdrawer's vLP ATA — must hold at least args.vlp_tokens

accounts.name: withdrawer_usdc
docs: Withdrawer's USDC token account (receives USDC)

accounts.name: lp_position
docs: LP position tracker — must exist (created on deposit)

instructions.name: write_option_listing
docs: Write a new option from scratch — locks collateral as counterparty

accounts.name: iv_oracle
docs: Oracle supplies the current spot price (needed to size Call collateral)

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: PDA that acts as authority over the escrow token account.
No data — purely a signing key.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — must be passed explicitly for `init` token accounts in Anchor 0.30

accounts.name: escrow_usdc
docs: USDC escrow: holds the writer's collateral until settlement or cancellation

instructions.name: zero_fees_collected
docs: Zero the fees_collected counter (cosmetic/admin reset). Authority-only.
Does not affect future fee accumulation.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not the vault authority

errors.name: UnauthorizedKeeper
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not the designated keeper

errors.name: InvalidExpiry
errors.msg: Invalid expiry: must be in the future

errors.name: ExpiryTooFar
errors.msg: Expiry too far in the future (max 90 days)

errors.name: ZeroPremium
errors.msg: Computed premium is zero or negative

errors.name: IVOutOfRange
errors.msg: IV value out of valid range [1%, 500%]

errors.name: StalePriceFeed
errors.msg: Price feed is stale (older than 60 seconds)

errors.name: DeltaBalanced
errors.msg: Delta imbalance within acceptable threshold; rebalance not needed

errors.name: IVOracleStale
errors.msg: IV oracle data is too old

errors.name: IVJumpTooLarge
errors.msg: IV jump too large: new IV deviates >50% from current value

errors.name: InvalidSeries
errors.msg: Series accounts not initialized: call ensure_series first

errors.name: ListingInactive
errors.msg: Listing is no longer active (already filled or cancelled)

errors.name: NotListingSeller
errors.msg: Caller is not the listing seller

fields.name: usdc_amount
docs: USDC amount to deposit, 6 dec

fields.name: min_lp_tokens
docs: Minimum LP tokens to receive (slippage protection)

types.name: AmmPool
docs: Constant-product AMM pool for a specific (market, type, strike, expiry) series

fields.name: vault
docs: Parent vault

fields.name: market
docs: Underlying market

fields.name: option_type
docs: Call or Put

fields.name: strike
docs: Strike price (6 dec USDC)

fields.name: expiry
docs: Expiry timestamp

fields.name: reserve_options
docs: Option units in the pool reserve (6 dec)

fields.name: reserve_usdc
docs: USDC in the pool reserve (6 dec)

fields.name: k_invariant_lo
docs: k = reserve_options * reserve_usdc (constant product invariant)
stored as u128 to avoid overflow

fields.name: total_lp_tokens
docs: Total LP tokens minted (6 dec)

fields.name: fees_earned
docs: Cumulative fees earned by LPs (6 dec USDC)

fields.name: last_rebalance
docs: Last rebalance timestamp

fields.name: usdc_amount
docs: USDC amount to deposit (6 dec)

fields.name: min_vlp_tokens
docs: Minimum vLP tokens expected — slippage guard (0 = no check)

types.name: EnsureSeriesArgs
docs: Args mirror BuyOptionArgs so the seeds can be derived identically.

types.name: IVOracle
docs: On-chain IV oracle for a single market
Stores the AFVR surface parameters and a rolling price buffer

fields.name: vault
docs: Parent vault

fields.name: market
docs: Which underlying asset

fields.name: iv_atm
docs: ATM implied volatility (scaled 1_000_000, i.e. 1.0 = 100%)

fields.name: iv_skew_rho
docs: Skew (rho): signed, scaled 1_000_000

fields.name: iv_curvature_phi
docs: Curvature (phi): scaled 1_000_000

fields.name: theta_param
docs: Term structure parameter (theta): scaled 1_000_000

fields.name: last_update
docs: Last update timestamp

fields.name: price_buffer
docs: Rolling price buffer (60 observations, ~1 per minute)

fields.name: latest_price
docs: Latest oracle price (6 dec USDC)

fields.name: latest_price_ts
docs: Latest price timestamp

types.name: IVParams
docs: IV parameterisation stored on-chain (AFVR surface)

fields.name: iv_atm
docs: ATM implied volatility in fixed-point (1_000_000 = 100%)

fields.name: iv_skew_rho
docs: Skew parameter rho (signed, scaled by 1_000_000)

fields.name: iv_curvature_phi
docs: Curvature parameter phi (scaled by 1_000_000)

fields.name: theta_param
docs: Term-structure theta (scaled by 1_000_000)

types.name: LPPosition
docs: LP position tracking liquidity provided to an AMM pool

fields.name: size
docs: Number of contracts to list (must be ≤ seller's position.size)

fields.name: ask_price
docs: Total USDC the seller wants for the entire `size`

fields.name: nonce
docs: Seller-chosen unique nonce (e.g. unix ms timestamp)

types.name: ListingType
docs: Whether the listing is a resale of an existing position or a freshly written option

types.name: Market
docs: Supported underlying markets
Discriminants must be stable — never reorder, only append.
Crypto: 0–2 | Equities: 3–8 | Commodities: 9–14

types.name: OptionListing
docs: A P2P marketplace listing — either a resale or a freshly written option.
PDA seeds: ["listing", seller, nonce_le8]
The seller picks any unique u64 nonce (e.g. current timestamp in ms).

fields.name: seller
docs: Wallet that created the listing

fields.name: vault
docs: Protocol vault this listing references

fields.name: size
docs: Number of option contracts being sold (6-decimal, underlying units)

fields.name: ask_price
docs: Total USDC the buyer must pay the seller (6 dec).
For Resale: resale premium. For Written: writer's premium.

fields.name: collateral_locked
docs: USDC locked in escrow (Written only; 0 for Resale).

fields.name: nonce
docs: Seller-chosen nonce for unique PDA derivation

fields.name: active
docs: false once filled or cancelled

types.name: OptionPosition
docs: A single buyer's option position

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for PDA

fields.name: owner
docs: Owner wallet

fields.name: vault
docs: Reference to the parent vault

fields.name: market
docs: Underlying market

fields.name: option_type
docs: Call or Put

fields.name: strike
docs: Strike price in USDC, 6 decimal fixed-point

fields.name: expiry
docs: Unix timestamp at which the option expires

fields.name: size
docs: Size in underlying units, 6 decimal fixed-point

fields.name: premium_paid
docs: Total USDC premium paid (including fees), 6 dec

fields.name: entry_iv
docs: Entry IV captured at time of purchase (scaled 1_000_000)

fields.name: entry_delta
docs: Delta at entry (signed, scaled 1_000_000)

fields.name: settled
docs: Whether this position has been settled / exercised

fields.name: payoff_received
docs: Payoff received on settlement (0 if OTM), 6 dec USDC

fields.name: created_at
docs: Creation timestamp

fields.name: spot_at_buy
docs: Spot at buy (scaled 1e6). Used at settle to decrement OI by the
SAME value buy_option added, eliminating drift. Older positions
have 0 (settle subtracts nothing, harmless).
Takes 8 bytes from the original 32-byte padding → no size change.

fields.name: _padding
docs: Reserved (was 32 bytes, now 24 after spot_at_buy).

types.name: OptionType
docs: Call or Put

types.name: OptionVault
docs: Root vault account – one per protocol deployment

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA derivation

fields.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority (admin / upgrader)

fields.name: keeper
docs: Designated keeper (IV updates, rebalancing, auto-settle)

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint this vault accepts

fields.name: usdc_vault
docs: Vault USDC token account (holds all collateral)

fields.name: total_collateral
docs: Total USDC collateral locked for open options (6 dec)

fields.name: open_interest
docs: Total open interest in notional USDC (6 dec)

fields.name: delta_net
docs: Net delta of all open positions (signed, scaled 1_000_000)
Positive = net long delta, negative = net short delta

fields.name: iv_params
docs: Current IV surface parameters (updated by keeper)

fields.name: last_iv_update
docs: Unix timestamp of last IV parameter update

fields.name: fees_collected
docs: Cumulative platform fees collected (6 dec USDC)

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether the protocol is halted

fields.name: total_vlp_tokens
docs: Total vLP tokens in circulation (global vault LP shares)

fields.name: vlp_mint
docs: SPL token mint for vLP tokens (set by initialize_vlp_mint)
Pubkey::default() until initialized

fields.name: _padding
docs: Reserved space for future fields

fields.name: prices
docs: Circular array of price observations (6 dec USDC)

fields.name: timestamps
docs: Timestamps for each price observation

fields.name: head
docs: Write head index (next slot to overwrite)

fields.name: count
docs: Number of valid observations stored (0 to PRICE_BUFFER_SIZE)

fields.name: target_delta
docs: Target delta position to achieve (signed, scaled 1e6)

fields.name: hedge_size
docs: Notional USDC size of the hedge trade (6 dec) — used for size guard only

fields.name: spot_price
docs: Underlying spot price (6 dec) — used to convert USDC notional → delta units

fields.name: is_buy
docs: Direction: true = buy perp (positive delta hedge), false = sell perp

fields.name: lp_tokens
docs: LP tokens to burn

fields.name: min_usdc_out
docs: Minimum USDC to receive (slippage protection), 6 dec

fields.name: size
docs: Size to sell back (may be partial), 6 dec underlying units

fields.name: min_proceeds
docs: Minimum USDC to receive (slippage guard), 6 dec

fields.name: settlement_price
docs: Settlement price provided by keeper (verified against oracle)

fields.name: settlement_price
docs: Settlement price provided by caller — validated against oracle (5% tolerance)

types.name: VaultLPPosition
docs: Global vault LP position — tracks deposit, yield share based on real vault fees.

fields.name: vlp_tokens
docs: vLP tokens held by this user

fields.name: usdc_deposited
docs: Cumulative USDC deposited (cost basis)

fields.name: created_at
docs: First deposit timestamp

fields.name: last_deposit_at
docs: Last deposit timestamp

fields.name: usdc_withdrawn
docs: Cumulative USDC already withdrawn

fields.name: fees_checkpoint
docs: Vault's cumulative fees at time of last deposit (checkpoint)
Used to compute the LP's fair share of fees earned since deposit.

fields.name: vlp_tokens
docs: vLP tokens to burn (6 dec)

fields.name: min_usdc_out
docs: Minimum USDC to receive — slippage guard (0 = no check)

fields.name: ask_price
docs: Premium the writer wants to receive (total USDC for the entire size)

fields.name: nonce
docs: Seller-chosen unique nonce

types.name: WrittenPosition
docs: Buyer's claim against a Written option.
Created when a Written OptionListing is filled.
The writer's USDC collateral sits in an escrow token account whose
authority PDA is ["listing_escrow", listing_pubkey].
PDA seeds: ["written_position", buyer, listing_pubkey]

fields.name: listing
docs: Back-reference to the OptionListing (used to derive escrow PDAs)

fields.name: premium_paid
docs: USDC premium paid by buyer to writer at fill time

fields.name: collateral_locked
docs: Mirrors listing.collateral_locked at fill time

fields.name: payoff_received
docs: Net payoff received by buyer at settlement (0 if OTM)
